channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Milton dips to Category 4 as Florida braces for impact
item.description: Florida's Gulf Coast braces for the impact of Hurricane Milton's winds and expected massive storm surge, which could bring destruction to areas already reeling from Helene's devastation 12 days ago.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Latest: Hurricane Milton takes aim at Tampa Bay, Florida, as a Category 4 storm
item.description: Hurricane Milton is weakening slightly but remains a ferocious storm that could land a once-in-a-century direct hit on Tampa and St. Petersburg, engulfing the populous region with towering storm surges and turning debris from Helene’s devastation 12 days ago into projectiles.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton may be October surprise in presidential battle
item.description: Strategists in both parties are looking back to Hurricane Sandy, which slammed into the mid-Atlantic states shortly before Election Day 2012.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 9 things to know about Hurricane Milton as it moves toward Florida
item.description: Milton has strengthened into a major hurricane on a path toward Florida not even two weeks after Hurricane Helene swamped the state's coastline.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Former Taiwan leader Tsai to visit Czech Republic, other European destinations, drawing China's ire
item.description: TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — Former Taiwan leader Tsai Ing-wen is to visit Czech Republic, and other European destinations, drawing China’s ire.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What polling shows about Black voters' views of Harris and Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Black registered voters have an overwhelmingly positive view of Vice President Kamala Harris, but they’re less sure that she would change the country for the better, according to a recent poll from the AP-NORC Center for Public Affairs Research.
item.dc:creator: MATT BROWN and LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Water gushes through palm trees and sand dunes after rare rain in the Sahara Desert
item.description: RABAT, Morocco (AP) — A rare deluge of rainfall left blue lagoons of water amid the palm trees and sand dunes of the Sahara desert, nourishing some of its most drought-stricken regions with more water than many had seen in decades.
item.dc:creator: SAM METZ and BABA AHMED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Harris reveals owning a Glock: 'Of course' I've fired it
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris said in a "60 Minutes" interview that aired Monday that she owns a Glock and has fired it at a shooting range in another example of how she and her campaign have made a point to highlight her gun ownership.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Milton to intensify and swell in size before unleashing on Florida and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Costco gold bars are selling out as prices for the precious metal break records: survey
item.description: Demand for the bars comes amid soaring gold prices, with the spot price for bullion hitting a record $2,686 on Sept. 26, according to APMEX.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, NewsNation

item.title: A peek inside human brain shows a way it cleans out waste
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A unique peek inside the human brain may help explain how it clears away waste like the kind that can build up and lead to Alzheimer’s disease. Brain cells use a lot of nutrients which means they make a lot of waste.
item.dc:creator: LAURAN NEERGAARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Control the path and power of hurricanes like Milton? Forget it, scientists say
item.description: In the wake of hurricanes that have disrupted lives for millions in the U.S., some people may wonder if extreme weather events could be somehow controlled.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling And Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: As Milton takes aim at Florida, why is Tampa Bay so vulnerable to hurricanes?
item.description: The last time the eye of a major storm like Hurricane Milton directly struck Tampa Bay was 1921 when the city was a sleepy backwater.
item.dc:creator: Terry Spencer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump mass deportation plan embraced by some border sheriffs
item.description: Speaking exclusively to NewsNation last week, Trump detailed why he would utilize the expertise of local authorities for his deportation plans.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: James Taylor, Luke Combs, Eric Church to take part in Helene relief concert in NC
item.description: "Concert for Carolina," featuring North Carolina natives James Taylor, Luke Combs and Eric Church, will be held at Bank of America Stadium in Charlotte with all proceeds going to Hurricane Helene relief efforts across the Carolina region, organizers announced.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Ullmann, Fox 5

item.title: Miss Teen Rodeo Kansas, 19, killed in car crash; teammates injured
item.description: Emma Brungardt, 19, was killed in a single-vehicle crash that left several of her teammates injured on Friday in rural Thomas County, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tips, overtime, Social Security: A look at Donald Trump's no-tax pledges and what they might cost
item.description: Donald Trump has pledged to end taxes on everything from tips to Social Security and overtime pay if he's elected to the White House again. But he hasn't detailed how he would fund those ideas and avoid creating a huge budget shortfall, beyond arguing he will usher in an economic boom.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Supreme Court won't hear arguments in Texas emergency abortion case
item.description: The Supreme Court decided not to hear arguments in a case involving Texas that could have provided an answer about whether a state abortion ban conflicts with a federal emergency care law.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, Fox 5

item.title: Colleges brace for Oct. 7 anniversary
item.description: Colleges face a major test Monday as pro-Palestinian and pro-Israel students both hold events for the first anniversary of Hamas’s attack on Israel.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: US spends a record $17.9 billion on military aid to Israel since last Oct. 7
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The United States has spent a record of at least $17.9 billion on military aid to Israel since the war in Gaza began and led to escalating conflict around the Middle East, according to a report for Brown University's Costs of War project, released Monday on the anniversary of Hamas
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Former model recalls Jeffrey Epstein abuse at private island, speaks out after his death: 'My life spiraled'
item.description: Lisa Phillips is a former model who said late financier Jeffrey Epstein abused her at his private island. The convicted sex offender took his life in 2019 while he was behind bars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Turning Point wants to revolutionize how Republicans turn out voters. Some are skeptical
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Turning Point’s representatives have made two things clear in meetings with state and local Republican leaders — Donald Trump has blessed their conservative organization to help lead his get-out-the-vote effort, and local party officials ought to use the group's new voter mobilizat
item.dc:creator: DAN MERICA and BRIAN SLODYSKO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Donald Glover cancels Childish Gambino tour dates over health issue
item.description: Donald Glover has canceled the remaining dates of Childish Gambino’s North American and European tour. The musician, actor and “Atlanta” creator announced on Friday that he recently discovered an ailment that required surgery. After his New Orleans show on Sept.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Israel intensifies bombardment of Gaza and southern Lebanon ahead of Oct. 7 anniversary
item.description: A new round of airstrikes hit Beirut suburbs late Sunday as Israel intensified its bombardment of northern Gaza and southern Lebanon in a widening war with Iran-allied militant groups across the region. Palestinian officials said a strike on a mosque killed at least 19 people.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tennessee nurse and his dog died trying to save a man from floods driven by Helene
item.description: “I’ve never had anyone risk their life for me,” David Boutin, the man Boone McCrary had set out to rescue said. “From what I hear that was the way he always been. He’s my guardian angel, that’s for sure.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Here's what Spirit Halloween seeks in an 'ideal' retail location
item.description: Spirit Halloween made headlines earlier this week after firing back at "SNL" over a sketch that mocked the company's choice of retail locations.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart will be closed on Thanksgiving Day for 5th consecutive year
item.description: Walmart will be closed on Thanksgiving Day for the fifth year in a row, the retail giant recently announced in its holiday plans.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Can you stop calls and texts from political campaigns?
item.description: If you've received a political text or call recently, you may be wondering how to make it stop, or what you can do to prevent them in the future.
item.dc:creator: Samantha Jarpe, Fox 5

item.title: How to save big on Prime Day by loading your carts now
item.description: Amazon's Prime Big Deal Days is almost here. Here's how to make sure you're getting the best deal possible during the event.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Palmer, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton growing stronger as it approaches Florida: NHC
item.description: Milton has strengthed into a hurricane in the Gulf of Mexico, according to the National Hurricane Center.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KRON4

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Keanu Reeves spins out at Indianapolis Motor Speedway in pro auto racing debut
item.description: Hollywood star Keanu Reeves made his professional auto racing debut on Saturday in an event in which “The Matrix” star spun out at famed Indianapolis Motor Speedway.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tropical Storm Milton forms in the Gulf, NHC says
item.description: Tropical Depression Fourteen has strengthened into Tropical Storm Milton, according to the National Hurricane Center.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Helene aftermath poses election hurdles in critical battlegrounds
item.description: Hurricane Helene has thrown up new hurdles for voters and election officials alike in Georgia and North Carolina, threatening disruptions to the voting process in two of the most critical battleground states.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, WGN 9

item.title: After the deluge, the lies: Misinformation and hoaxes about Helene cloud the recovery
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The facts emerging from Hurricane Helene's destruction are heartrending: Businesses and homes destroyed, whole communities nearly wiped out, hundreds of lives lost, hundreds of people missing.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Inside the North Carolina mountain town that Hurricane Helene nearly wiped off the map
item.description: CHIMNEY ROCK VILLAGE, N.C. (AP) — The stone tower that gave this place its name was nearly a half billion years in the making — heated and thrust upward from deep in the Earth, then carved and eroded by wind and water.
item.dc:creator: ALLEN G. BREED, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles D.A. to ‘reevaluate’ Menendez brothers’ convictions
item.description: Los Angeles County District Attorney George Gascón provided an update Thursday on the convictions of Erik and Lyle Menendez, who were convicted of killing their parents in August 1989.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, WGN 9
